common.condition_behavior_description: How the state should match on the targeted entities.
common.trigger_behavior_description: The behavior of the targeted entities to trigger on.
common.trigger_threshold_changed_description: Which changes to trigger on and threshold values.
common.trigger_threshold_crossed_description: Which threshold crossing to trigger on and threshold values.

is_detected.description: Tests if light is currently detected.
is_detected.name: Light is detected

is_not_detected.description: Tests if light is currently not detected.
is_not_detected.name: Light is not detected

above.description: Require the illuminance to be above this value.
above.name: Above

below.description: Require the illuminance to be below this value.
below.name: Below

changed.description: Triggers after one or more illuminance values change.
changed.name: Illuminance changed

cleared.description: Triggers after one or more light sensors stop detecting light.
cleared.name: Light cleared

crossed_threshold.description: Triggers after one or more illuminance values cross a threshold.
crossed_threshold.name: Illuminance crossed threshold

detected.description: Triggers after one or more light sensors start detecting light.
detected.name: Light detected
